name: Vegetable Bean Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 Vegetarian Veg. Bouillon Cube (OR 2 beef bouillon cubes)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 3-quart saucepan, combine water, vegetable juice, soup mix, and bouillon cube.
2. Bring the mixture to a boil.
3. Add pasta flakes, dried onions, celery seed, and frozen vegetables. Reduce heat and simmer slowly for 10 minutes.
4. Stir in drained chick peas and tabasco (or to taste), pepper, and salt. Adjust seasoning as desired.
5. Heat through and serve. For non-vegetarian soup, add leftover beef or chicken if desired.
